data.name: Charter To Paradise
data.detailed_description:
[SHORT STORY]

You play from a third person perspective as a young man whom inherited the family’s wealth, you chose to use some of that money to start a cruise business that mostly caters to engagement parties or bridal parties. However, on this trip you're hosting the event for a bachelorette party. You can choose to interact with the guests while they're aboard your yacht. Or you can simply be the curious host and keep the interaction purely professional. As soon as the guests arrive you'll embark on out to sea and head for paradise island. With both night and day interactions you can choose where to go and whom to talk to: spontaneous connections, and unforgettable nights. It’s a place where grown-ups let go, unwind, and write their own stories—luxurious, intimate, and just a little bit wild.

  • Choose your own route through one playthrough or multiple!

  • Decide which route you would like to take with any of these lovely women.

  • Enjoy an easy-to-click navigational map throughout the story.

  • Speed through your route by following your chosen's marker or take your time to experience it all! The choice is yours.
data.about_the_game:
[SHORT STORY]

data.short_description: After inheriting your grandpa’s charter boat, you find yourself ferrying all kinds of guests to your paradise island. From exciting and erotic passengers to unexpected twists, choose the route you want. Who knows what could happen next?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 捷克文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 6 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 6 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
